Worth every penny — I recommend Assure to everyone.” Ahmed Al-Rashid Dubai Frequently Asked Questions Common Questions About Hair Transplant Is a hair transplant painful? No. The procedure is performed under local anaesthesia, so you feel no pain during extraction or implantation. Most patients describe the experience as comfortable and relaxed. You can take breaks, eat, and use your phone during the session. Mild tenderness in the donor area may last 2-3 days after the procedure, managed easily with prescribed medication. Is a hair transplant permanent? Yes. Transplanted hair follicles are taken from the donor area (back and sides of the head) which is genetically resistant to hair loss. These follicles retain their characteristics after transplantation and continue to grow naturally for a lifetime. Initial results are visible within 3-4 months, with full density at 10-12 months. What is the recovery time? Most patients return to work within 2-3 days. Initial redness subsides within 7-10 days. Transplanted hair sheds temporarily at 2-3 weeks (completely normal), with new growth starting at 3-4 months. Full results are visible at 10-12 months. Our team provides comprehensive aftercare support throughout your recovery. What makes Assure Clinic different from other clinics? Assure Clinic uses a patented UHDHT (Ultra High Density Hair Transplant) method that combines two proprietary techniques: UFME for ultra-fine extraction with minimal scarring, and DSHI for precision implantation that maximises graft survival. All procedures are performed exclusively by qualified doctors, never technicians. With 13 clinics across 11 cities, 60+ doctors, and a 95% graft survival rate across 20,000+ procedures, Assure delivers consistently natural results at scale. How much does a hair transplant cost? Cost depends on the number of grafts needed, the technique used, clinic location, and case complexity. Assure Clinic uses transparent Full Head Results pricing based on achieving your desired outcome, not per-graft costs. Every case is unique, so we recommend a free consultation for a personalised estimate. Call +91-9586122444 or fill out the form above to get started. How do I book a free consultation? You can book a free consultation by filling out the form on this page, calling +91-9586122444, or sending a WhatsApp message. A medical consultant will assess your hair loss pattern, discuss your goals, and recommend the best treatment approach. Consultations are completely free with no obligations.
